stores.name: Barbershop
stores.description: A barbershop on Main Street.
stores.flavorText: Nobody listens to barbershop quartets here, to say the least.
stores.costPreview: Store trading is coming later.
stores.inventoryNote: This store will eventually offer cassette inventory.

stores.name: Church Basement
stores.description: The basement of Windsor Presbyterian Church.
stores.flavorText: Lots of cassettes, but no cussing.
stores.costPreview: Store trading is coming later.
stores.inventoryNote: This store will eventually offer cassette inventory.

stores.name: Concert
stores.description: Pick up Night Ritual's latest, or cassettes from some of their best friends
stores.flavorText: When the lights are off it's hard to tell that this is the Civic Auditorium.
stores.costPreview: Unlock inventory through achievements.
stores.inventoryNote: This store will eventually reward milestones with special cassette designs.

stores.name: Library
stores.description: Get a used cassette from the Friends of the Library.
stores.flavorText: "Shh!"
stores.costPreview: Spend completed listens to browse curated tapes.
stores.inventoryNote: This store will eventually favor thoughtful, study-friendly cassette designs.

stores.name: Roller Rink
stores.description: They're still playing disco.
stores.flavorText: If you like what you heard in the rink, you can buy it here.
stores.costPreview: Unlock inventory through achievements.
stores.inventoryNote: This store will eventually reward milestones with special cassette designs.

stores.name: The Car
stores.description: Yes, it's a Delorean.
stores.flavorText: There's always something good in here somewhere.
stores.costPreview: Revisit old favorites to unlock personal-stash tapes.
stores.inventoryNote: This store will eventually connect repeat listening with cozy cassette designs.

stores.name: The Couch
stores.description: It was a great couch in the 70s.  Now it feels like there's something under the cushions.
stores.flavorText: You never know what you might find.
stores.costPreview: Revisit old favorites to unlock personal-stash tapes.
stores.inventoryNote: This store will eventually connect repeat listening with cozy cassette designs.

stores.name: Big Box Bookstore
stores.description: You'll never find a larger selection.
stores.flavorText: "I've never heard of that band."
stores.costPreview: Spend completed listens to browse curated tapes.
stores.inventoryNote: This store will eventually favor thoughtful, study-friendly cassette designs.

stores.name: College Bookstore
stores.description: Northfield University Bookstore focuses on academic titles.
stores.flavorText: "I can't help you right now, I'm studying."
stores.costPreview: Spend completed listens to browse curated tapes.
stores.inventoryNote: This store will eventually favor thoughtful, study-friendly cassette designs.

stores.name: NPS Store
stores.description: Cassettes focused on nature and the outdoors.
stores.flavorText: "Try the ambient tapes."
stores.costPreview: Spend completed listens to browse curated tapes.
stores.inventoryNote: This store will eventually favor thoughtful, study-friendly cassette designs.

stores.name: Gas Station
stores.description: Some of these cassettes have been here for a while.
stores.flavorText: "Still under $1 a gallon!"
stores.inventoryTheme: Travel, night drive, and street finds
stores.costPreview: Trade duplicate cassettes for roadside finds.
stores.inventoryNote: This store will eventually offer travel and street-themed cassette designs.

stores.name: QuickStop
stores.description: A roadside gas station with a refill for your tape deck and your gas tank.
stores.flavorText: A tiny selection focused on the most popular titles
stores.inventoryTheme: Travel, night drive, and street finds
stores.costPreview: Trade duplicate cassettes for roadside finds.
stores.inventoryNote: This store will eventually offer travel and street-themed cassette designs.

stores.name: Punk's Locker
stores.description: Smells a little bit like weed.
stores.flavorText: “Nothing too strange today. Unless you look in the back.”
stores.costPreview: Trade duplicates for a mystery cassette.
stores.inventoryNote: This store will eventually turn extra cassettes into surprise pulls.

stores.name: Tigers' Lockers
stores.description: Most of the cassettes here are homemade demo tapes for high school bands that will never make it.
stores.flavorText: "Bro! Buy something!"
stores.costPreview: Trade duplicates for a mystery cassette.
stores.inventoryNote: This store will eventually turn extra cassettes into surprise pulls.

stores.name: Windsor High Locker
stores.description: Locker #327 has dozens of surprises for sale.
stores.flavorText: "Windsor High Football Rules!"
stores.costPreview: Trade duplicates for a mystery cassette.
stores.inventoryNote: This store will eventually turn extra cassettes into surprise pulls.

stores.name: Beach Records
stores.description: Laid back albums form the backbone of this beachgoer favorite.
stores.flavorText: Check the cassette for sand before you buy it.
stores.costPreview: Use completed listens to unlock shop inventory.
stores.inventoryNote: This store will eventually offer classic cassette-shop designs.

stores.name: Downtown Records
stores.description: An unassuming store with a well-curated selection.
stores.flavorText: "How did you hear of us?"
stores.costPreview: Use completed listens to unlock shop inventory.
stores.inventoryNote: This store will eventually offer classic cassette-shop designs.

stores.name: Spin City Records
stores.description: A music store near the state capitol.
stores.flavorText: Music and some cassettes on politics.
stores.costPreview: Use completed listens to unlock shop inventory.
stores.inventoryNote: This store will eventually offer classic cassette-shop designs.

stores.name: Sunset Records
stores.description: Located on the famous Sunset Strip, this store has everything you need for the tape deck in your convertible.
stores.flavorText: A narrow staircase leads to a basement filled with humming amplifiers and cassettes bearing names you have never seen anywhere else.
stores.costPreview: Use completed listens to unlock shop inventory.
stores.inventoryNote: This store will eventually offer classic cassette-shop designs.

stores.name: College Town Cassettes
stores.description: Retired library cassettes fill several rolling carts. Many contain lectures, stories, field recordings, and voices from places that no longer exist.
stores.flavorText: "We still have vinyl if you want it.  You know it sounds better."
stores.costPreview: Use completed listens to unlock shop inventory.
stores.inventoryNote: This store will eventually offer classic cassette-shop designs.

stores.name: MegaMall Music
stores.description: A chain store in a bustling mall.
stores.flavorText: “Mainstream is upstairs.”
stores.costPreview: Use completed listens to unlock shop inventory.
stores.inventoryNote: This store will eventually offer classic cassette-shop designs.

stores.name: Persian Rug Records
stores.description: A quiet, neighborhood store with an intimate feel.
stores.flavorText: “That one sounds better after midnight.”
stores.costPreview: Use completed listens to unlock shop inventory.
stores.inventoryNote: This store will eventually offer classic cassette-shop designs.

stores.name: The Cassette Hut
stores.description: “Collectors only. Tourists shop out front.”
stores.flavorText: A tiny shop in on a back street.
stores.costPreview: Use completed listens to unlock shop inventory.
stores.inventoryNote: This store will eventually offer classic cassette-shop designs.

stores.name: 125th Street Mixtapes
stores.description: A boombox and a well-stocked supply of bootleg concert tapes and up-and-coming artists.
stores.flavorText: "You've never heard anything like this before."
stores.inventoryTheme: Travel, night drive, and street finds
stores.costPreview: Trade duplicate cassettes for roadside finds.
stores.inventoryNote: This store will eventually offer travel and street-themed cassette designs.

stores.name: The Flea Market
stores.description: Second-hand cassettes but not second-class cassettes.
stores.flavorText: “Rare is not the same as good. This is both.”
stores.inventoryTheme: Travel, night drive, and street finds
stores.costPreview: Trade duplicate cassettes for roadside finds.
stores.inventoryNote: This store will eventually offer travel and street-themed cassette designs.
